parameters.content:
## Save new Amazon reviews to Notion with AI sentiment tags via ScraperAPI

### How it works

1. Triggers every Monday at 8am to configure a watchlist of Amazon ASINs.
2. Fetches Amazon product details based on the configured ASINs.
3. Extracts and classifies sentiment of new reviews using AI.
4. Normalizes and appends the classified reviews to a Notion database.
5. Provides a setup for Notion columns configuration via manual trigger.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Configure Amazon product ASINs, Notion database ID, TLD, and countryCode in the 'Configure Watchlist' node.
- [ ] Obtain and set up credentials for Scraper API and Notion API.
- [ ] Manually run the setup trigger to ensure Notion columns are initialized.

### Customization

The ASINs and sentiment classification model can be customized according to user preference.

## Scheduled watchlist configuration

Sets up and schedules the watchlist every Monday.

## Fetch and extract reviews

Fetches product data from Amazon and extracts new reviews.

## Review sentiment analysis

Classifies and normalizes review sentiment using an AI model.

## Append reviews to Notion

Appends the normalized reviews to the Notion database.

## Notion setup initializer

Manual trigger to setup Notion database columns.

assignments.name: asins
assignments.value: ={{ [ { asin: 'B000UXZQ42', label: 'Wireless Headset' }, { asin: 'B0CXGTGPZQ', label: 'Gaming Headset' }, { asin: 'B0BVBVPSX6', label: 'Bluetooth Headset' } ] }}

messageValues.message:
You are a product review analyst. Classify a single Amazon customer review. Return ONLY a JSON object — no preamble, no markdown fence — with this exact shape:

{
  "sentiment": "positive" | "neutral" | "negative",
  "feature_tags": ["short feature or topic label", "..."],
  "summary": "one short sentence summarizing the review"
}

feature_tags: 1-4 short lowercase labels for the product aspects the review discusses (e.g. "battery life", "price", "build quality", "shipping", "sound quality", "customer support"). Base the sentiment on both the review text and the star rating. Never invent details that are not in the review.

nodes.name: Run once — set up Notion columns

name: Save Amazon reviews to Notion with ScraperAPI and OpenAI GPT-5 Mini
